examples: Presently she gave over skylarking, and moved irresolutely about, sighing once or twice and glancing furtively and wistfully toward Tom.
The car struck him a glancing blow on the hip.
The grandfather had been busy in his little shop, merely glancing over at the child from time to time.
Hull grabbed one back straight away, Dawson glancing home a header past the stranded Schwarzer.
It is a charge that can not hold up even under the most glancing scrutiny.
